title: automatika-robotics/embodied-agents
summary: EmbodiedAgents is a fully-loaded ROS2 based framework for creating interactive physical agents that can understand, remember, and act upon contextual information from their environment.

title: Netis/TokenScope
summary: LLM API performance monitoring via network traffic analysis. Measures TTFT, TPOT, E2E latency, and token throughput for OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, vLLM, and Ollama — deployed on the provider side, no SDK changes required.

title: garudust-org/garudust-agent
summary: 🦅 Open-source self-improving AI agent in Rust — persistent memory, skill learning, tool hub, multi-platform bots & production gateway

title: akamai-developers/akamai-functions-semantic-search-cache
summary: A Semantic Search with Caching and defense strategies powered by Akamai Functions

title: giobbu/notes-ai-agents
summary: Notebooks exploring LLMs, AI agents, and their observability and safety with MLOps.

title: bherald/personal-life-os-core
summary: Local-first personal automation platform for workflows, RAG/GraphRAG search, review queues, genealogy/media evidence, and operator-guided agents.

title: Iito/spindll
summary: Drop-in Ollama alternative in Rust. Pull models, serve streaming inference over gRPC, multi-model with LRU eviction. Single binary, Metal/CUDA.

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: Lightweight multi-tenant agentic runtime in one Go sidecar. Owns the LLM tool-use loop across Anthropic, OpenAI, and   Ollama with native prompt-cache control, MCP tool dispatch, and per-tenant fairness. TypeScript and Python adapters over   HTTP+SSE. Powers JobEmber.

title: tmy7533018/mugen-shell
summary: Hyprland + Quickshell shell with Material You theming, video wallpapers, and an integrated AI chat panel (Ollama / Gemini)

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive AI Memory Platform — Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter as you use it. Hybrid search, neural memory graph, AI reranking, and web UI. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Qdrant.

title: duongductrong/Instantly
summary: Free & open source your always-ready AI assistant for macOS

title: however-yir/however-microservices-lab
summary: Multi-language microservices lab with AI integration, 12 services on Kubernetes with gRPC and HTTP.

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: Visual Builder for AI Workflows and Agents

title: jctots/second-brain
summary: A plain-markdown knowledge platform — PARA-structured, version-controlled, with context-aware AI across sessions. Cloud to self-hosted, no lock-in.

title: promplate/oai2ollama
summary: OpenAI API -> Ollama API (original idea: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-copilot-release/issues/7518#issuecomment-3043670968)

title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 170 rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: Hashevolution/James-RAG-Evol
summary: Security-focused, locally-runnable Graph-RAG knowledge engine with explicit reasoning paths and self-evolution scaffolding

title: pat-the-geek/be-clear
summary: Application de pilotage des interactions ORG/ENV/ENG/EVENT — FastAPI + React 19 + PostgreSQL

title: chayachandana/Incident-response-on-call-agent
summary: incident response agent - LangGraph + Ollama + ChromaDB + FastAPI

title: content-vigilante/Content-Vigilante
summary: Patrols your content for off-brand violations. An open-source brand voice auditor. Multilingual, local-first, BYO LLM.
